case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. LUIS PASCUAL ROMO

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROMO, LUIS PASCUAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMO, LUIS PASCUAL $1,822.70 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,902.70, IF PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO AGREE ON PAYMENT ARRANGEMENTS, DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT, SUPPORTED BY FINANCIAL DECLARATION AND PERTINENT SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS.
